_comment: Borrow #1 FrugalGPT cheap-first/score/escalate thresholds. Read by EscalationPolicy (mChatAI+ Swift); the binary carries identical _fallback_only defaults. Per-TaskCategory: min_completeness = the 0..1 cheap-quality bar the returned text must clear to avoid escalating; expected_min_tokens = length floor for a complete answer of this kind; require_syntax = gate the score on a balanced-fence/bracket check (code only); max_retries = escalation hops after the first cheap rung. Edit + git push + refreshMchataisourceCache ships with no rebuild. The Swift enforcer clamps min_completeness to 0..1 and max_retries to 0..3 and falls back per-key on anything missing/malformed, so a bad edit can never disable scoring or hard-loop escalation. cost_budget_tokens is a soft WARN guard, never a hard abort.
